title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system
shortDescription: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that answers questions from custom documents using local embeddings and LLMs.
description: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) back-end that enables users to query their own documents through natural language. The system ingests text documents, splits them into semantic chunks, generates embeddings using Ollama's nomic-embed-text model, and stores them in a Chroma vector database. At query time, relevant document chunks are retrieved through similarity search and injected into a prompt before being sent to a locally hosted Ollama language model. The project uses semantic search, vector databases, prompt engineering, and privacy-preserving AI workflows running entirely on local infrastructure.
